data.revised_prompt: photorealistic cinematic Japanese drama film still, environmental storytelling, professional book-summary video visual, warm natural light, quiet emotional realism, realistic lived-in details, 35mm lens, 16:9, no readable text. Scene 08/8, Sea healing. Primary instruction: wide sunrise seaside overlook; wooden rail, open sea, low orange light, red camellias in foreground; the woman is seen from behind, small in frame, facing the horizon. Visible character rule: one East Asian woman, early 30s, short black bob haircut, cream cardigan, white top, dark skirt; exactly one visible person, never a close-up portrait, never looking directly at camera. Emotional theme: quiet healing and unsent letters finding a place. Blank paper only, no readable words.
